summary: iter234 testing complete. 20/20 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified: Splash screen with particle canvas and zoom logo, outlet switcher shows 'Rooftop Lounge' (new neutral name), voice panel with CognitiveMindCanvas and proactive briefing, Recipes tab with mobile-authored badge support, recipe detail view with Ingredients/Directions tabs, Import URL flow with paste button and editable preview, P&L view with auto-refresh chip and KPIs, session persistence via localStorage.

ui_bugs.issue: Legacy recipes show '[object Object]' for ingredient names because they have ingredient_id instead of name field

issues: Recipe cards show 'Yield X portion · $ cost' without actual recipe names - only yield/cost visible

action_items: Fix RecipeDetailView to handle legacy recipes with ingredient_id instead of name - need to resolve ingredient names from ingredient_id or show ingredient_id as fallback
Fix Recipes list to show recipe names (item_name) instead of just yield/cost info
critical_code_review_comments: RecipesTab.tsx line 250: String(ing) returns '[object Object]' when ing is an object without name/ingredient properties - need better fallback handling
Legacy recipes in menu_recipes collection have ingredient_id references instead of inline names - need to join with ingredients collection or update data structure

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all iter234 features verified except ingredient display bug)

test_credentials: X-User-Id: chef-william for backend. devAuth=1 query param for frontend auth bypass.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed mobile recipes for testing published_from='mobile' badge
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter234 features tested: (1) Legal rename - all 8 outlets have new neutral names (Rooftop Lounge, Garden Room, Club Bar, Pool Grill, Market Cafe, Coastal Kitchen, In-Room Dining, Ballroom Catering). Legacy outlet IDs (outlet-windows, outlet-nectar, etc.) removed. (2) Splash screen works with particle canvas and zoom logo animation. (3) Voice panel has CognitiveMindCanvas behind transcript, proactive briefing returns time-aware greeting with rain warning. (4) Recipe URL import flow works - paste button, editable preview, save-imported endpoint. (5) Mobile-authored recipes show 📱 MOBILE badge when published_from='mobile'. (6) Recipe detail has Ingredients/Directions tabs. (7) P&L view has auto-refresh every 3h chip and last-updated time. (8) Session persistence via ecw_last_tab localStorage works. Known issue: Legacy recipes show [object Object] for ingredients because they use ingredient_id references instead of inline names.

P&L KPIs - PASS (Revenue $579,740, Food 21.95%, Labor 24.54%, Prime 46.49%)
